author: wth461694678
description: Add a timer to text block to track task time consumption.

manifest.author: frankthwang
manifest.description: Add a timer to text block to enable count-up timing (Performance Improved!).
manifest.name: Text Block Timer

name: Text Block Timer

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
V1.0.9
1. **==Critical Bug Fix==**: Fixed the undo history pollution issue — timer real-time updates no longer pollute the editor's undo/redo stack. (Thanks to [mosmash](https://github.com/mosmash) for reporting!)
2. **Timer Style Optimization**: Redesigned the timer rendering style; added option to hide hours digit for shorter durations.
3. **==New Feature==**: Added Time Adjustment function with an iPhone-style scroll wheel time picker UI, accessible via right-click menu and command palette, fully compatible with mobile.
4. Closed issues: [#12](https://github.com/wth461694678/text-block-timer/issues/12), [#11](https://github.com/wth461694678/text-block-timer/issues/11), [#7](https://github.com/wth461694678/text-block-timer/issues/7)
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.9

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
- V1.0.8
  1. **Appearance optimization**: Added a timer emoji customization function. Now you can use your favorite ICONS to represent the running and paused states respectively.
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.8

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
- V1.0.7
1. **==Major Optimization==**: Added support for **read-only mode**, now the timer can be updated in real time and data can be persisted even in read-only mode.
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.7

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
-V1.0.6 
1. BUG Fix: Resolved the issue of startup failure caused by incorrect language configuration code
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.6

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
- V1.0.5
  1. ==Major Feature==: This plugin now supports usage on the Mobile end!
  2. ==Major Optimization==: Added support for **read-only mode**, now the timer can be updated in real time and data can be persisted even in read-only mode.
  3. ==Major Feature==: Added a timer deletion function, which can be accessed through the command line or right-click menu.
  4. **Slimming Plan for Timer Blocks a Huge Success!**: The length of Timer blocks has been significantly reduced by 60% in version V1.0.5.
  5. Bug Fix: Fixed the issue where time display was incorrect after exceeding 24 hours.
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.5

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
- V1.0.4
  1. ==Major Feature==：Now you can control the timer switch by the checkbox in the task front.
  2. Improve the function of creating timers, now it will not directly expose the span's source code
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.4

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
- V1.0.3
  1. ==Major Optimization==: Closing a file no longer causes the timer to fail. Users can freely choose whether to continue timing when the or Obsidian is closed (see custom settings).
  2. Added custom settings: Users can now choose the position to insert the timer (before or after texts).
  3. Improve compatibility with markdown, adding support for ordered checkboxes and headings.
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.3

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description: Add Language Support, specifically for English, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.

releases.author: wth461694678
releases.description:
1. A space is added before the time tag to better distinguish it from your content.
2. Fixed the issue where adding a timer disrupted the structure of checkboxes in Markdown.
releases.name: Text Block Timer v1.0.1
